---
title: "Q1: [Your first question goes here]"
description: "A one-sentence teaser that appears on the listing page."
date: 2026-07-09
categories: [foundations]
---

## The question

State the question plainly, the way a curious person would actually ask
it.

## The short answer

Two or three sentences. A reader in a hurry should be able to stop
here.

## The long answer

The full walk-through, from first principles. This is where the series
earns its keep.

## What this builds on

Nothing yet — this is Q1, the foundation stone.

## Terms pinned in this entry

- **term** — working definition (also added to the [Glossary](../../glossary.qmd))
